answers.name: T65
answers.context: Subheading: E. PRODUCT INFORMATION. Specific instructions for using the selected product.
answers.answer: Days 1, 15 Load Then Once Every 24 Weeks. 1st infusion - initiate at 50mg/hr and if no infusion toxicity reaction, may increase by 50mg/hr ever 30 minutes; Max Rate 400mg/hr. Subsequent infusions - initiate at 100mg/hr and if no infusion toxicity reaction, may increase by 100mg/hr every 30 min; Max Rate 400mg/hr. Starting 30 minutes after treatment start time.
